name: handbook_platform_styles_en
instruction: What platform-style presentations can feed posts use? Just answer the question from the docs — do not create or change anything.

input.query: platform style presentation feed posts UI

mock_script.final: According to the handbook, posts render in a social-feed presentation whose platform style is chosen per survey at creation time; display fields (title, image, source, counters) can be overridden per post. Nothing was created or changed.
